title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
